description: 71 - 12-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jonathan Powell
text:
(National Security Adviser, No.10)

From: Peter Mandelson[ Personal
Sent: Wed 12/02/2025 2:36:41 PM (UTC)

To: Jonathan Powell] Personal ]

Subject: Re: ***

Thanks

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Jonathan Powell

Sent: Wednesday, February 12, 2025 9:35:49 AM
To: Peter Mandelson

Subject: Re: bie

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

ke

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Wednesday, February 12, 2025 2:32:18 PM
To: Jonathan Powell
Subject: Re: ase

RK

Thanks.
Thad no read out of SMG meeting. Any conclusions ?

Get Outlook for iOS

207

From: Jonathan Powell

Sent: Wednesday, February 12, 2025 9:30:20 AM
To: Peter Mandelson

Subject: +

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

WhenI see *** tomorrow we will give him the suggestion for what we could announce on
the economic relationship when Keir visits - will send the draft

to you this evening for comment. ee

208
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
